    nvcompAlignmentRequirements_t
    \brief Per-algorithm buffer alignment requirements.
    nvcompBatchedANSCompressOpts_t
    \brief ANS compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedANSDecompressOpts_t
    \brief ANS decompression options for the low-level API

    \brief Bitcomp compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedBitcompDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Bitcomp decompression options for the low-level API

    \brief Cascaded compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedCascadedDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Cascaded decompression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedCRC32Opts_t
    \brief Options for batched CRC32 computation.
    nvcompBatchedDeflateCompressOpts_t
    \brief Deflate compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedDeflateDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Deflate decompression options for the low-level API

    \brief Gdeflate compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedGdeflateDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Gdeflate decompression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedGzipCompressOpts_t
    \brief Gzip compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedGzipDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Gzip decompression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedLZ4CompressOpts_t
    \brief LZ4 compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedLZ4DecompressOpts_t
    \brief LZ4 decompression options for the low-level API

    \brief Snappy compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedSnappyDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Snappy decompression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedZstdCompressOpts_t
    \brief Zstd compression options for the low-level API
    nvcompBatchedZstdDecompressOpts_t
    \brief Zstd decompression options for the low-level API
    nvcompCRC32KernelConf_t
    \brief Configuration for CRC32 kernel execution.
    nvcompCRC32Spec_t
    \brief CRC32 model specification.
    nvcompManagerBase
    \brief Abstract base class that defines the nvCOMP high-level interface \note This base class should not be directly constructed.
    nvcompProperties_t
    \brief nvCOMP properties.

    Class and Description
    BitcompFormatSpecHeader
    \bried Format specification for Bitcomp compression
    CompressionConfig
    \brief Configuration used to aggregate information about the compression of a particular buffer.
    DecompressionConfig
    \brief Configuration used to aggregate information about a particular decompression.
    DeflateFormatSpecHeader
    \brief Format specification for Deflate compression
    GdeflateFormatSpecHeader
    \brief Format specification for GDeflate compression
